sns.subscription.Endpoint.Docs: The endpoint that receives notifications from the Amazon SNS topic. The endpoint value depends on the protocol that you specify. For more information, see the `Endpoint` parameter of the ` [Subscribe](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sns/latest/api/API_Subscribe.html) ` action in the *Amazon SNS API Reference*.

sns.subscription.Protocol.Docs: The subscription's protocol. For more information, see the `Protocol` parameter of the ` [Subscribe](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sns/latest/api/API_Subscribe.html) ` action in the *Amazon SNS API Reference*.
